name: Native Crab Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except scallions in a large bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Add the sliced scallions and mix gently to incorporate them into the mixture.
4. Form the mixture into eight 2-inch crab cakes by hand or using a mold.
5. Heat an 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat and melt the butter in the skillet, ensuring it is hot but not smoking.
6. Cook the crab cakes for 3 to 4 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown.
